home.title: Builders Fund | OpenG7
home.description: Support OpenG7 and the Builders Fund, an open infrastructure for funding transparent, resilient public digital platforms.

ecosystem.title: OpenG7 Ecosystem | Open public platforms
ecosystem.description: Explore OpenG7 platforms, their families, connections, and shared architecture for public digital services.

support.title: Support and GitHub repositories | OpenG7
support.description: Access OpenG7 GitHub repositories, review projects, open issues, and contribute to the ecosystem.

about.title: About OpenG7 | Builders Fund
about.description: Discover OpenG7’s vision, shared foundations, and the role of the Builders Fund in developing the ecosystem.

transparency.title: Builders Fund transparency | OpenG7
transparency.description: View aggregated public Builders Fund data: contributions, fees, estimated availability, and transparency records.

hero.backgroundAlt: Digital map of Canada above a connected city
hero.title: The ecosystem
hero.lead: Thirteen platforms. Shared foundations. Open infrastructure to better connect Canada.

map.title: Interactive ecosystem map
map.copy: OpenG7 organizes thirteen interconnected platforms around six major families to generate better, faster, and more inclusive services for all Canadians.

platformDescriptions.nexus: Unified access point between citizens, businesses, and public services.
platformDescriptions.vehicleRegistry: National vehicle registry for reliable and secure transactions.
platformDescriptions.migration: Analysis and orchestration of migration flows for smoother pathways.
platformDescriptions.patientNavigation: Guides patients through personalized care pathways.
platformDescriptions.referral: Routes requests to the right specialists at the right time.
platformDescriptions.workforce: Connects health professionals with institutional needs.
platformDescriptions.supply: Optimizes availability and distribution of critical medical supplies.
platformDescriptions.govgraph: Graph of services and regulations for better public interoperability.
platformDescriptions.electionOps: Modern, secure, and transparent election operations.
platformDescriptions.voterRegister: Verifiable and up-to-date voter registry and official documents.
platformDescriptions.social: Citizen engagement and public consultation platform.
platformDescriptions.firewall: Protection for services, identities, and data at national scale.
platformDescriptions.funding: Orchestrates public funding and impact grants.

architecture.title: A shared architecture
architecture.copy: OpenG7 is built on a shared foundation that reduces costs, accelerates delivery, and ensures interoperability.
architecture.platformDotsAria: The 13 platforms connected to the shared foundation

familyDetails.health: Integrated patient pathways, less waiting, better coordination.
familyDetails.data: Reliable data, shared securely, for better decisions.
familyDetails.mobility: Fluid transportation and logistics, services accessible everywhere.
familyDetails.security: Protected identities, resilient services, increased trust.
familyDetails.funding: Better allocated resources, high-impact projects for everyone.

items.referral: Route the request to the right specialist
items.patient: Support the patient at every step
items.nexus: Unified access point and centralized services

cta.title: Canada already has the resources, talent, and institutions.
cta.copy: OpenG7 aims to connect them better.

hero.mapAlt: Digital map of Canada connected to the OpenG7 ecosystem
hero.dragonAlt: Guardian dragon of the OpenG7 ecosystem
hero.title: Build OpenG7 with
hero.copy: GitHub is the public workshop of the ecosystem. Explore repositories, report an issue, suggest an idea, and contribute code.

explore.title: Explore repositories
explore.description: Browse OpenG7 projects, their goals, and their progress.

issue.title: Report an issue
issue.description: Help improve quality by reporting a bug or unexpected behavior.

idea.title: Suggest an idea
idea.description: Share improvement ideas, new features, or use cases.

code.title: Contribute code
code.description: Forks, code, tests, and pull requests: every contribution counts.

repositories.title: Choose a repository
repositories.copy: Here are the main repositories of the OpenG7 ecosystem. Click to explore, read documentation, or contribute.

steps.title: How to use GitHub with OpenG7?

explore.title: Explore
explore.description: Browse repositories and read README files to understand each project.

issue.title: Create an issue
issue.description: Report a bug or request an improvement through the Issues tab.

improvement.title: Suggest an improvement
improvement.description: Describe your idea, its value, and its context.

pullRequest.title: Open a pull request
pullRequest.description: Submit your code or changes for review.

warning.title: Never publish API keys, passwords, or personal data.
warning.copy: For a security vulnerability, use the private channel listed in SECURITY.md.

info.title: OpenG7 is currently an independent project in development.
info.copy: Discussion and contributions mainly happen through GitHub.

footer.title: Made in Canada. Open for everyone.

hero.imageAlt: Luminous map of Canada rising from a chest above Toronto
hero.title: About
hero.description: OpenG7 is an open ecosystem of digital platforms connecting provinces, organizations, and communities from coast to coast. The Builders Fund supports the shared foundations that make these projects possible.

infrastructure.title: Open infrastructure
infrastructure.description: Common foundations for deploying reliable and verifiable digital services.

transparency.title: Transparent funding
transparency.description: Every contribution supports the general fund and can be followed publicly.

impact.title: Collective impact
impact.description: The platforms move forward together to serve communities, data, and real-world needs.

checkout.successAlt: Black and gold dragon dropping coins into a safe
checkout.cancelAlt: Closed safe guarded by a dragon
checkout.successTitle: The Builders chest has received your contribution.
checkout.successCopy: Thank you for helping OpenG7 fund open, resilient, and transparent infrastructure. The public fund will sync as soon as Stripe confirmation is available.
checkout.cancelTitle: The chest remains closed for this contribution.
checkout.cancelCopy: No confirmed payment was added to the registry. You can resume your contribution whenever you are ready.

hero.backgroundAlt: Luminous Canadian city with a connected maple leaf
hero.copy: The Builders Fund powers an open digital ecosystem to strengthen Canada’s economy, transparency, and resilience.

purpose.dragonAlt: Guardian dragon protecting a civic funding chest
purpose.title: Where do the funds go to support
purpose.copy: Every contribution is tied to a concrete mission: keeping platforms online, improving public tools, and publishing a clear financial registry.
purpose.remainingForGoal: still needed to reach the monthly goal.

received.title: Contribution received
received.copy: Secure payment is started from the page.

confirmed.title: Payment confirmed
confirmed.copy: The contribution is validated and added to the public total.

fees.title: Fees deducted
fees.copy: Processing fees remain visible in the calculation.

available.title: Funds available
available.copy: The net amount funds OpenG7 infrastructure and projects.

allocation.title: Planned fund allocation
allocation.empty: No public allocation has been published yet.

contribution.title: Choose your contribution
contribution.success: Local simulated checkout. Configure Stripe in /dev/stripe-setup to open real payment.

footer.copy: The 13 cards show what we are building.
footer.strong: The Builders Fund shows how we fund it.

cards.social: Open and sovereign social network for communities and ideas.
cards.migration: Migration flow analytics engine for intelligent planning.
cards.firewall: Advanced protection for infrastructure and critical data.
cards.electionOps: Secure coordination of election day operations.
cards.voterRegister: Voter registry and official digital documents.
cards.vehicleRegistry: National vehicle registry for greater safety and efficiency.
cards.nexus: Unified portal for civic services and processes.
cards.patientNavigation: Guides patients through personalized care pathways.
cards.referral: Smart routing to the right care at the right time.
cards.supply: Resilient supply chains for the health system.
cards.funding: Transparent platform for funding OpenG7 initiatives.

resilience.title: Resilience
resilience.description: Solid foundations for a safer future.

openFuture.title: Open future
openFuture.description: Open technology in service of everyone.

status.unavailable: Stripe registry is unavailable for now.
status.empty: No confirmed Stripe contribution in the registry yet.

seo.title: The Dragon Chants | OpenG7
seo.description: Soon discover OpenG7’s musical universe, its chants, creations, and news from the Realm.

hero.backgroundAlt: Golden dragon and luminous fortress in the OpenG7 universe
hero.title: The Dragon Chants
hero.copy: Chants born from faith, resilience, creation, and unity. A new musical experience will soon come to life at the heart of OpenG7.

album.title: First OpenG7 album
album.disabledButton: Listen to the album — Coming soon

news.title: News from the Realm
news.copy: Posts, announcements, creations, and community news from OpenG7 will soon be gathered here.

announcement.title: Royal announcement
announcement.summary: A space dedicated to major project announcements is being prepared.

creation.title: Creation journal
creation.summary: Behind-the-scenes notes on chants and visuals will soon be shared.

community.title: Community voices
community.summary: OpenG7 community news will be gathered here.

cta.title: The Dragon is preparing its chants.
cta.copy: Come back soon to discover the first musical works of OpenG7.

seo.title: NorthDragon Shop | OpenG7
seo.description: Discover the NorthDragon shop, its clothing, accessories, and creations inspired by strength, faith, resilience, and transformation.

hero.backgroundAlt: Golden dragon and castle under dark skies for the NorthDragon universe
hero.title: NorthDragon Shop
hero.subtitle: Creations inspired by strength, faith, resilience, and inner nobility.
hero.copy: Discover clothing, accessories, and exclusive creations designed for those who carry their story with courage.

links.discoverAria: Discover the NorthDragon shop in a new tab

exclusive.title: Exclusive creations
exclusive.description: Original designs inspired by the Dragon universe.

onDemand.title: Made to order
onDemand.description: Items produced with care after each order.

securePayment.title: Secure payment
securePayment.description: Transactions protected by the shop’s payment solutions.

international.title: International shipping
international.description: A selection of items available in several regions of the world.

support.title: Project support
support.description: Every purchase contributes to the NorthDragon universe and the OpenG7 ecosystem.

clothing.title: Clothing

accessories.title: Accessories
accessories.description: Caps, scarves, bags, and accessories inspired by the Dragon.

home.title: Home and style
home.description: Cushions, decorative objects, and creations that extend the NorthDragon universe.

special.title: Special collections
special.description: Symbolic creations around rebirth, faith, and inner sovereignty.

featured.title: A selection from the Realm
featured.subtitle: The full collections are available on NorthDragon.org.

signature.description: Pieces to wear like soft armor, between restraint and presence.

accessories.description: Visual complements that extend the NorthDragon identity every day.

symbolic.description: Editorial previews around rebirth, faith, and transformation.

universe.description: Style and atmosphere ideas that carry the story beyond clothing.

brand.title: NorthDragon — Born to rise again
brand.copy: NorthDragon is more than a shop: it is a signature. A universe inspired by the dragon, nobility, resilience, faith, and transformation. Every creation carries inner strength: the courage to rise again, the beauty of standing back up, and the elegance of moving forward with power.
brand.quote: “Wear your story. Move forward with power.”

ecosystem.title: A creation of the OpenG7 ecosystem
ecosystem.copy: NorthDragon represents the creative, symbolic, and commercial dimension of the OpenG7 ecosystem. The shop helps bring its creations, stories, and projects to life.

cta.title: Enter the NorthDragon universe
cta.copy: Discover creations designed to represent strength, transformation, and restored light.
